chunks.content:
Article: What the heck is this thing in akihabara
[]: What the heck is this thing in akihabara?             Quote Post by V » Fri Jul 11, 2008 10:13 am http://kemux.com/2008/07/post_349.html they're stated to be "eva coin lockers" of some kind but I'm not sure exactly what these are

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 11, 2008 10:21 am They seem to just be lockers for storage somewhere, but what's kinda cute is it seems like the titles for the lockers are puns on the Japanese episode titles: 第壱話　「荷物、襲来」 第弐話　「見知らぬ、ロッカー」 第八話　「ニモツ、来日」 第九話　「瞬間、荷物、重ねて」 第拾弐話「百円の価値は」 第拾参話「荷物、侵入」 第拾四話「八時間、魂の座」 第拾八話「荷物の選択を」 第拾九話「男のロッカー」 第弐拾弐話「せめて、ロッカーらしく」 最終話　「ロッカーの中心でアイをさけんだにもつ」 第弐拾六話「コインロッカーを、君に」 Crappy but better than nothing Google trasnlator wrote: The story壱"luggage, Invasion" The弐話"stranger, lockers" Eighth, said: "NIMOTSU visit Japan" Ninth, said, "The moment the package again." The弐話拾"the value of the yen" Article XIII, said: "luggage, intrusion" Article XIV, said: "Eight hours, the position of the soul" Chapter XVIII said, "The selection of luggage" 拾in the story of "man's rocker" Article XX弐話"If the ROKKARASHIKU" Last episode of "lockers in the center of the eye SAKENDA" Article XXVI, said: "Safe to you"

[]:

Article: What the heck is this thing in akihabara
man's rocker" Article XX弐話"If the ROKKARASHIKU" Last episode of "lockers in the center of the eye SAKENDA" Article XXVI, said: "Safe to you"

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Jul 11, 2008 12:38 pm ingenius wow, they actually remember what the episode titles are? most people I've met never refer to them by name

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Fri Jul 11, 2008 3:50 pm Um, noob's attempt. I have no idea what this "story" thing is. I don`t know Japanese and my only resources are Wiktionary, Google Translator, and Wikipedia for the list of episodes. This just looked fun to do. First story, Luggage Attack (An Angel's Attack) Second story, An Unfamiliar Locker (An Unfamiliar Ceiling) Eighth, Luggage visits Japan (Luggage Strikes?) (Asuka's Arrival in Japan) Ninth,　Luggage Once More in An Instant (A Heart Once More in an Instant) Twelfth, Concerning the worth of yen (Concerning the Worth of a Miracle) Thirteenth, Luggage`s invasion (An Angel's Invasion) Fourteenth, Eight hours, the throne of the soul (you can keep your luggage in the locker for eight hours?) (SEELE, the Throne of Souls) Eighteenth, The Choice of Luggage (The Choice of Life) Nineteenth, Man's Locker (Man's Battle) Twenty second, At Least be a locker (At Least, Be Human) Umm, finale? To shout "ai" at the heart of the locker (?) (The Beast that Shouted Love at the Heart of the World) Twenty sixth story, Coin locker for you (My Purest Heart for You)

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Fri Jul 11, 2008 4:14 pm There's a joke involving Davy Jones in here somewhere...

Article: What the heck is this thing in akihabara
 to just be lockers for storage somewhere, but what's kinda cute is it seems like the titles for the lockers are puns on the Japanese episode titles: 第壱話　「荷物、襲来」 第弐話　「見知らぬ、ロッカー」 第八話　「ニモツ、来日」 第九話　「瞬間、荷物、重ねて」 第拾弐話「百円の価値は」 第拾参話「荷物、侵入」 第拾四話「八時間、魂の座」 第拾八話「荷物の選択を」 第拾九話「男のロッカー」 第弐拾弐話「せめて、ロッカーらしく」 最終話　「ロッカーの中心でアイをさけんだにもつ」 第弐拾六話「コインロッカーを、君に」
